lab: College of Life Science and Technology

study_title: Comparing the head transcriptome of honey bees at 9 days old and 1 day old.
exp_title: RNA-Seq the head transcriptome of 9 days old bees
design: 100 9-days-old-honeybees selected. The heads of selected workers were detached and pooled for RNA extraction in liquid nitrogen. RNA extractions were performed by RNeasy Mini Kit-QIAGEN.

exp_title: RNA-Seq the head transcriptome of  1 day old bees
design: 100 1-days-old-honeybees selected. The heads of selected workers were detached and pooled for RNA extraction in liquid nitrogen. RNA extractions were performed by RNeasy Mini Kit-QIAGEN.
